title: gastrorchis humblotii var. rubra
intro: Gastrorchis humblotii var. rubra, also known as the Ruby Gastrorchis, is a rare and exotic orchid species native to Madagascar. It is valued for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and its health benefits also include its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Gastrorchis humblotii var. rubra can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by steeping its flowers or leaves in hot water, or used as a tincture or extract in traditional medicine.
